data.body: The /update-site Claude skill. Quick mode (one-liner → MDX) and developed mode (rich input with images/links). Output: MDX to src/content/now/YYYY-MM-DD.mdx matching schema from ASMV-15. Git integration: commit + push triggers auto-deploy. Must complete full loop in < 5 minutes.

## Review: /update-site skill implementation

### What was reviewed
- .claude/commands/update-site.md (246 lines) — the complete skill command
- .lattice/plans/task_01KJTWWBDAHP3TDH2DBC9E5BXT.md — plan with 9 design decisions

### Acceptance Criteria Check
1. Command exists and is loadable: PASS — .claude/commands/update-site.md created in project scope
2. Quick mode (3 questions): PASS — Step 3 has single-prompt quick mode with mood/project/description
3. Developed mode (all questions): PASS — Step 3 has 6-question developed mode with body text, tags, multiple images
4. Riso engine integration: PASS — Step 2 runs riso_engine.py with --no-riso support
5. Texture generation: PASS — Step 1 offers generate option with paper/stipple scripts
6. Existing entry handling: PASS — Step 4 checks for collision, offers overwrite/append/skip
7. Voice guidance: PASS — Step 4 includes studio-desk tone direction with anti-patterns
8. Smart validation: PASS — Step 5 uses parse validation when dev server running, avoids pnpm build clobber

### Issues Found
None blocking. All 8 recommendations from ASMV-25 review were incorporated.

### Minor Observations
- The  variable reference in Step 1 assumes Claude Code passes slash command arguments this way. This is correct for Claude Code slash commands.
- The archive step (Step 7) uses commented-out commands as templates rather than active code — this is intentional since the agent should track which specific files it processed.
- The gray-matter require() in the validation script (Step 5) assumes gray-matter is in the project's node_modules, which it is per package.json.

### Verdict: PASS
Moving to done.
